data.body:
Waylon Jennings: Ol’ Waylon (RCA APP1-2317, 1977)

This was my dad’s record. He died when I was 10. “Luckenback, Texas” was his favorite. Mine too but the whole album is good. Has a lot of that weird late-70s country flange guitar tone and some goofy covers. But the good stuff is really good.
